name: Dr. Nicolas Arkham
description:
Well, welcome to 2026 and Merry (very late) Christmas.

I hope, you have been doing well and we’re able to spend the holidays with family and friends.

Anyway, I didn‘t really have ideas what to make and a Christmas Arkham has been requested, so, here you go.

(Btw, I‘m curious about what you want in this year since i saw events like kinktober, so, yeah, make your request. I‘m pretty much open to everything as long as it’s legal and right to my morals.)

Have fun!
creator: Millie123
